settings.heading: Goodness in every grain.

settings.title: High Fiber
settings.description: Millet is naturally rich in dietary fiber, supporting gut health and keeping you full longer.

settings.title: Sustained Energy
settings.description: Low glycemic index grains release energy slowly — no crash, just clean fuel all day.

settings.title: No Preservatives
settings.description: Clean label products with zero artificial additives, colors, or preservatives. Just real food.

settings.title: Less Water
settings.description: Millets need 70% less water than rice and wheat — one of the most climate-resilient crops on earth.

settings.heading:
Rooted in tradition,
built for today.
settings.mission_text: Take Odisha-grown millets from local farms to global shelves.
settings.content:
Millo is a millet-based food brand by Nutriswift Foods Private Limited, created to bring traditional Indian nutrition into modern lifestyles.

We believe the grains our ancestors thrived on deserve a place on today's table — not as a compromise, but as a celebration of clean, powerful nutrition.

Every product is sourced directly from Odisha's millet farmers, processed minimally, and delivered with full transparency.
